scripts.reset: rm -f agent-data/session.json && echo '✅ Session reset (kept memories/patterns)'
scripts.reset:full: rm -f agent-data/session.json && rm -rf agent-data/memories/* agent-data/relationships/* agent-data/transcripts/* && git checkout agent-data/learned-patterns.md && echo '✅ Full reset (back to seed state)'
scripts.reset:nuclear: rm -rf agent-data && git checkout agent-data && echo '✅ Nuclear reset (everything wiped)'
